title: centaurea buhseana
intro: Centaurea buhseana, also known as blue cornflower or cornflower, is a perennial plant in the daisy family native to Eastern Europe and Western Asia. The plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine, and its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Centaurea buhseana include reducing inflammation, soothing digestive issues, and providing antioxidant properties, which can help protect against cell damage and oxidative stress. Centaurea buhseana is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
